prose:
Fukui reactivity indices were computed for phenol (13 atoms: O×1, C×6, H×6) at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') with PySCF (RKS), in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The cation (charge +1, multiplicity 2) and anion (charge −1, multiplicity 2) single-point energies were used via finite-difference Mulliken partial charges to construct the Fukui functions.

Headline result (most electrophilic site): f⁺ = 2.1028319 on C3 (atom 3, 1-based), the ortho carbon relative to the hydroxyl group.
Most nucleophilic site: f⁻ = 0.16201477 on O1 (atom 1, the oxygen).
